title: Growth chart review
source_review_basis: full authoritative documents inspected and archived; item-level retain/rewrite/remove/add comparisons recorded

assessment.text: Specifies age-linked weight, length or height, head circumference, growth plotting, feeding and medical history, developmental milestones, screening, immunization review, and caregiver counselling.
assessment.rationale: Supports age-linked weight, length or height, head circumference and growth plotting for child growth-chart review; no decision is generated.

source.title: Standard for Well-Child Visits
source.population: Children aged 1 month to 6 years attending well-child visit screening services.
source.setting: DoH-licensed healthcare facilities providing well-child visit screening services in Abu Dhabi.
source.exclusions: Direct for age-specific well-child screening in Abu Dhabi; partial for children outside the stated age range and for symptom-led growth or developmental presentations. The published copy states an effective date of TBD.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Specifies age-linked weight, length or height, head circumference, growth plotting, feeding and medical history, developmental milestones, screening, immunization review, and caregiver counselling.

assessment.text: Specifies weight and height measurement, clinical/developmental/social assessment, detailed feeding or eating history, observation, and assessment-directed investigations.
assessment.rationale: Supports weight, height, clinical, developmental and feeding assessment for child growth-chart review; no decision is generated.

source.title: Faltering growth: recognition and management of faltering growth in children — Recommendations
source.population: Infants and children with weight loss or concerns about faltering growth.
source.setting: Primary, community, and specialist pediatric care.
source.exclusions: Exact for faltering-growth assessment and feeding history; partial for undifferentiated acute poor feeding and not directly validated for UAE practice.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Specifies weight and height measurement, clinical/developmental/social assessment, detailed feeding or eating history, observation, and assessment-directed investigations.

assessment.text: Defines growth monitoring and referral for underlying disorder, failure to respond, slow growth, rapid weight loss, severe undernutrition, safeguarding concern, or acute illness.
assessment.rationale: Supports growth monitoring and referral context for child growth-chart review; no decision is generated.

source.evidence_paraphrase: Defines growth monitoring and referral for underlying disorder, failure to respond, slow growth, rapid weight loss, severe undernutrition, safeguarding concern, or acute illness.
